release_notes: **License fingerprint no longer flaps on restart**: `get_fingerprint()` now reads Windows' per-install `MachineGuid` instead of `uuid.getnode()` (MAC address). The old scheme was unstable on any machine with more than one network adapter (e.g. Wi-Fi + a VPN like Tailscale) — adapter enumeration order can race the VPN service coming up at boot, silently changing the fingerprint and invalidating an otherwise-valid license until the app was restarted again. Every key issued before this fix needs reissuing against the new MachineGuid-based fingerprint.
